case_title: 5264 THIRD ST HOME OWNERS ASSOCIATION VS. SHIRLEY HAMILTON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY 5264 THIRD ST HOME OWNERS ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT HAMILTON, SHIRLEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-15-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM PLAINTIFF GRANTED**
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-15-2023 - JUDGMENT.
SC-109(AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR) NICOLETA SIMIONESCU FILED BY PLAINTIFF 5264 THIRD ST HOME OWNERS ASSOCIATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 5264 THIRD ST HOME OWNERS ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAMILTON, SHIRLEY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,135.00, PLEASE SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION.
